didimpute 0.0.0.9000
  • Get started
  • Reference

Compute cluster-robust SEs for control-variable coefficients (influence function)

Source: R/standard_errors.R
compute_controls_se.Rd

Faithful port of Python compute_controls_se (did_imputation.py lines 351-404, 691-695). For each control c: demean c and the other controls on FE (untreated subsample, after dropping singleton FE levels); regress demeaned c on demeaned others; form per-observation ctrlweight from residuals; cluster- sum ctrlweight * imput_resid; sandwich V = M'M.

Usage

compute_controls_se(dt, controls, fe, cluster, aw, df_a, beta)

Arguments

dt

data.table containing untreated and treated rows (needs imput_resid on untreated rows)

controls

character vector of control column names

fe

character vector of FE column names

cluster

name of cluster column

aw

name of analytic weight column, or NULL

df_a

absorbed degrees of freedom (from .compute_df_a)

beta

named numeric vector of WLS coefficients for each control

Value

named numeric vector of cluster-robust SEs, one per control

On this page
